mapper.select: select distinct su.cid from sys_user su where (find_in_set(CONCAT(su.dept_id, ''), (select d.ancestors from building_info bi inner join sys_dept d on (bi.dept_id = d.dept_id) where bi.id = #{buildingId})) > 0 or su.dept_id = (select d.dept_id from building_info bi inner join sys_dept d on (bi.dept_id = d.dept_id) where bi.id = #{buildingId}) and su.cid is not null) and su.user_id in (select user_id from sys_user_role where role_id = (select role_id from sys_role where role_key = CONCAT('alert_', #{sensorType})))

select distinct su.cid from sys_user su left join sys_user_role sur on (su.user_id = sur.user_id) left join sys_role sr on sur.role_id = sr.role_id where sr.role_key in ('admin', 'sys_admin', 'pc_admin') and su.cid is not null
